case_title: GUILLERMO DE LEON VS. RC MAINTENANCE, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LEON, GUILLERMO AS TO DEFENDANT RC MAINTENANCE, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE LEON, GUILLERMO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RC MAINTENANCE, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $3,504.00 PRINCIPAL, $12.81 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,741.81, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
